authority: non-authoritative (partial generalizability proxy; full golden set is v0.3.x+ work)
purpose: opt-in source for nines self-eval D01/D02/D03/D05 coverage and future real-LLM eval consumption

spec_11_compliance.router_model_training: prompts are LABELS for future real-LLM eval, not training data for a learned ranker
spec_11_compliance.generic_ide_compat: path is under evals/si-chip/, scoped to this repo only

nines_self_eval_signal_addressed.D01_scoring_accuracy: seeding directory enables a future golden-set-driven scoring pass
nines_self_eval_signal_addressed.D02_eval_coverage: 24 prompts spanning 5 of 6 canonical cases (docs_boundary only used for trigger-refuse prompts) + all 5 §8.1 step-4/5/6 surfaces
nines_self_eval_signal_addressed.D03_samples_dir_exists: evals/si-chip/golden_set/ now exists — D03 should flip from 0 to 1 on next nines run
nines_self_eval_signal_addressed.D05_golden_set_path: nines --golden-dir evals/si-chip/golden_set/ is now a valid invocation

comment: Round 10 opt-in source. Non-authoritative. NOT consumed by the deterministic runner — the existing 6 canonical cases under evals/si-chip/cases/ remain the runner's input. golden_set/ is for future nines / real-LLM eval use only.
